hero.subtitle: Get rid of complex Excel tables and old-school notebooks. Put aside useless programs. Device tracking, stock management, cashbook, and technical service professionalism all in one place.

features.section_subtitle: Everything you need to grow your business on a single platform.
features.whatsapp_desc: Send professional WhatsApp messages with one click when you receive the device, when the repair is finished, or when it is delivered. Customers can track the repair process instantly via the link you send.
features.glass_desc: An intelligent algorithm that answers the question "Do I have a screen protector suitable for this model?" with 98% accuracy.
features.secondhand_desc: Store customer ID photocopies and device photos in the system when buying devices. Secure your legal responsibilities in a digital environment.
features.stock_desc: When accessory stocks run out, they automatically drop into the "Missing Products" list. Track repair part costs based on foreign exchange and always protect your profit.
features.stock_f2: Barcoded product sales and barcode generation
features.stock_f4: Standard price quote — same price for every customer
features.customer_desc: See purchase, sale, and repair history on a single screen with full-scope customer tracking.
features.reporting_desc: Keep your finger on the pulse of your business with detailed daily, weekly, and monthly reports. Print or export all reports.
features.offline_desc: Continue working with low latency through a strong local data layer, even when the internet is interrupted.
features.multilang_desc: An experience at global standards with 8 language supports.

why.title: Why GSM Ofis Pro?

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business. Start with a 33-day free trial.
pricing.yearly_desc: Access to all features with annual payment.
pricing.lifetime_desc: Pay once, use for a lifetime. Updates included.
pricing.faq1_q: How long is the free trial period?
pricing.faq1_a: All our plans include a 33-day free trial period. No credit card information is required during the trial.
pricing.faq2_a: Yes. GSM Ofis Pro keeps working at full performance without an internet connection. Your data stays on the store computer. A one-time internet connection is required only for the first login.
pricing.faq3_a: Absolutely. Your data is encrypted with DPAPI and securely backed up via the cloud.
pricing.faq4_a: GSM Ofis Pro supports 8 languages: Turkish, English, German, French, Italian, Arabic, Portuguese, and Spanish.
pricing.faq5_a: With a one-time payment, you use the software for a lifetime. All updates and new features are included for free.
pricing.lemon_disabled_notice: Credit card payments are currently unavailable. To purchase via cryptocurrency, please contact the admin.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: GSM Ofis Pro is hybrid desktop management software that brings daily operations for phone stores and technical services into one clear workspace.
about.intro1: We build the product to speed up repetitive in-store work such as repair records, second-hand device sales, accessory stock, customer balances, reporting, printing, and WhatsApp communication.
about.intro2: Our approach is simple: the interface stays clear, business data runs fast in a local database on the shop computer, and license and session operations are managed securely through the cloud.
about.section1_body: The dashboard shows active repairs, missing products, stock summaries, and device status. Technical service, stock, device, customer, reporting, and backup modules work together.
about.section2_body: Business data stays in a local data layer on the store computer. Cloud services are used for sessions, licensing, and optional secure backup; the store keeps control of its data.
about.section3_body: Glass compatibility search, Price Keeper, barcode labels, bulk sales, currency settings, and WhatsApp sharing are designed to save time at the counter.
about.section4_body: GSM Ofis Pro supports Turkish, English, German, French, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, and Arabic interfaces for businesses in different markets.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: At GSM Ofis Pro, our focus is solving real store problems with simple and reliable software.
careers.intro1: We develop a product that small businesses use every day. Speed, data security, clear interfaces, and field feedback are core priorities for us.
careers.intro2: We are open to working with people who can contribute to product development, technical support, content, test automation, localization, and customer experience.
careers.section1_body: We understand the user flow first, then build the smallest reliable solution. We prefer measurable value and stable features over unnecessary complexity.
careers.section2_body: We look for teammates who own their area, communicate clearly, handle data carefully, and care about the real users in the field.
careers.section3_body: Open roles are shared periodically. If you have a strong way to contribute to the product, you can contact us through live support.
careers.section4_body: We especially value contributions around local database performance, backup, multilingual UX, printing, barcode flows, reporting, and customer experience.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This policy explains the data processed on the GSM Ofis Pro website, trial registration, support communication, and product use.
privacy.intro1: We use the data we collect only to provide the service, manage licenses, deliver support, protect security, and improve the product.
privacy.intro2: Store operation data is designed to remain on your local system whenever possible. When cloud backup is enabled, your backups are stored in secure spaces assigned to your account.
privacy.section1_body: Trial forms and support channels may process shop name, full name, username, email, phone, license information, support messages, and technical error logs.
privacy.section2_body: This information is used for account creation, license verification, support responses, payment and billing processes, security checks, and product improvements.
privacy.section3_body: Data is not sold or shared with third parties except where required for legal obligations, payment infrastructure, authentication, hosting, backup, or support services. Retention is limited by service and legal needs.
privacy.section4_body: You may request access, correction, deletion, restriction of processing, or clarification from our support team. You can send your request through live support.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: These terms apply to the GSM Ofis Pro website, trial account, license, and software use.
terms.intro1: By using GSM Ofis Pro, you accept these terms. You should use the product only for lawful business activities and your own business records.
terms.intro2: The software helps manage technical service, stock, devices, customers, reports, backup, printing, currency, and WhatsApp sharing workflows.
terms.section1_body: A trial or paid license is assigned to a person or business. Protecting login credentials is the user’s responsibility. Unauthorized sharing or misuse may result in service suspension.
terms.section2_body: Your business is responsible for the accuracy of customer, device, stock, cash, and backup data entered into the product. Regular local and cloud backups are recommended.
terms.section3_body: Plan, price, and license scope are stated at purchase. Updates may include security, performance, and feature improvements.
terms.section4_body: You may not use the service for reverse engineering, unauthorized access attempts, trying to reach other users’ data, or keeping unlawful records.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: This policy explains cookies, local storage records, and similar technologies used on the GSM Ofis Pro website.
cookies.intro1: Limited technical records may be used to run the site experience, remember your language preference, maintain security, and understand performance.
cookies.intro2: You can delete or block cookies in your browser settings. If some essential records are disabled, language selection, sessions, or form experiences may not work as expected.
cookies.section1_body: Required records are used for core functions such as page loading, language selection, security, trial forms, and live support.
cookies.section2_body: Browser local storage may be used to remember preferences such as your selected language. These records personalize the experience.
cookies.section3_body: When enabled, anonymized measurements such as page performance and visitor interaction may be used to improve the product and website.
cookies.section4_body: Authentication, live support, payment, media, or analytics infrastructure may use their own cookies. These services are integrated only to provide necessary functions.
